description:
Your personal research assistant

Zotero is a free, easy-to-use tool to help you collect, organize, annotate, cite, and share research.
- Improved attachment saving
  - Improved attachment saving on sites with aggressive anti-bot measures or unusual authentication schemes, for people using certain proxy servers, and for people on networks where the Zotero app has more limited network access than the browser
- Fixed potential sync error after annotating snapshot in Zotero 7.1 beta on another computer
- Fixed citation dialog and tabs menu not working if open tab is in library not visited since app start
- Fixed a situation where locally missing files might not be downloaded
- Preserve existing internal capitalization (e.g., “iPhone”) when converting title to sentence case
- File renaming improvements
  - Added support for counting creators
  - Added support for Pascal case
- Fixed transfer of attachment title between items if clicking directly to another item while editing
- Ignore invalid relative path when changing linked attachment base directory
- Restore hiding of “Endnotes” option in Google Docs, which doesn't support endnotes
- Fixed plugins not loading properly when enabled if disabled on app start
- Show clearer message in Run JavaScript window if no result
- Miscellaneous bug fixes
